user_message: Working on Contoso Ltd's consumption trend -- need you to pull the context.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-21 17:29 EST
Subject: Follow-up: consumption trend Review

Our team encountered some challenges with consumption trend. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
Date: 2024-01-17 13:06 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Contoso Ltd

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Contoso Ltd
Date: 2024-02-11
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on consumption trend from our last session.

[00:08:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is security compliance.

[00:17:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:21:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:23:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:27:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is vendor dependencies.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Pre-Meeting Brief template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
